title: 30PCS Garden Stakes,11mm x 40cm Green Plant Support Sticks with Straight Connecting Pipe,Plants Growing Sticks,Garden Canes Vine Support Stakes for Vegetables,Plants,Shrubs and Pea
features: 【Practical Set】Our garden stake set contains 30 garden stakes 11 mm diameter by 40 cm long and 15 connecting tubes. You can assemble them to the desired length depending on the growth of your plants.

【Safe Material】Garden plant Stakes are made of hollow steel and coated with plastic, which can effectively prevent rust and reduce scratches. Even in wet soil, it is not easy to loosen and damage, making it more durable.

【Exquisite Design】The surface of each garden stake has anti-slip corrugations, making it more suitable for plants to climb. The ends of the support bars are tapered, allowing them to be easily inserted into the soil, making them firm and stable. It is also equipped with 15 connecting tubes, which you can install to the desired length according to the growth rate of the plants. These subtle designs will keep your plants growing healthily.

【Wide Application】 These plant support bars can support climbing plants such as vines, peas, tomatoes, grapevines, cucumbers, etc. They can also be used to build trellises or tents to provide a natural protective support environment for plants.

【Shopping with Confidence】This is definitely the best tool for gardening enthusiasts! If you have any questions or suggestions about the product, please feel free to contact us and we will do our best to solve it for you and ensure that you can shop with confidence!
description: Product description Specification: Material: Plastic coated steel core Color: Green Diameter: 11MM Length: 40CM Package Content: 30PCS Garden Plants Stakes,15PCS Garden Plants Sticks Connector. Safety Warning General Safety Warning: Users should exercise caution while handling and installing the anchor stakes to avoid injury from the sharp ends. Protective eyewear is recommended during installation. After use, wash hands thoroughly. If the stakes come into contact with harmful chemicals, rinse them off immediately. Always follow local regulations when digging and inserting stakes to prevent damage to underground utilities. For safe handling and use, refer to the product manual.
